code: import{io}from'socket.io-client';let socket=null;export const initSocket=token=>{if(socket)socket.disconnect();socket=io(process.env.REACT_APP_SOCKET_URL||'http://localhost:5000',{auth:{token},transports:['websocket','polling']});socket.on('connect',()=>console.log('Socket connected:',socket.id));socket.on('connect_error',err=>console.error('Socket error:',err.message));return socket;};export const getSocket=()=>socket;export const disconnectSocket=()=>{if(socket){socket.disconnect();socket=null;}};
